about.subtitle: Sınav Salonu is Türkiye's most comprehensive online exam preparation platform.
about.missionBody: To be the most reliable guide on the road to success by offering quality, up-to-date and effective test content to candidates preparing for exams. Every candidate can study at their own pace, track their progress, and reach their goals.
about.visionBody: To be the first platform that comes to mind for exam preparation in Türkiye. By bringing together technology and education, we offer equal opportunity to every candidate and pioneer the digital transformation in education.
about.value1Body: Every test package is carefully prepared by expert educators in the field and continuously updated.
about.value2Body: We continuously improve through the feedback of our candidates and educators, and maintain open communication.
about.value3Body: We offer affordable and easily accessible content so everyone can access quality education.
about.value4Body: We continuously improve the learning experience by leveraging the power of technology.
about.why1Body: Expert educators in their fields and up-to-date test content.
about.why2Body: Track your progress, discover your strengths and weaknesses.
about.why3Body: Study whenever and wherever you want with our mobile-friendly platform.

privacy.s1Body: At Sınav Salonu, we respect the privacy of our users and place great importance on protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy describes our practices regarding personal data collected, processed and stored on our platform.
privacy.s2Intro: The following personal data may be collected while using the platform:
s2List: Name, surname, email address and phone number
privacy.s3Intro: Collected personal data is used for the following purposes:
s3List: Platform improvements and developing new features
privacy.s4Body: We use industry-standard security measures to ensure the security of your personal data. Your data is transmitted over encrypted connections and stored on secure servers. Technical and administrative measures are in place against unauthorized access, alteration or disclosure.
privacy.s5Intro: Your personal data is not shared, sold or rented to third parties. However, your data may be shared in the following cases:
s5List: Trusted payment providers for payment processing
Cloud service providers for platform infrastructure
Specific cases with your explicit consent
privacy.s6Intro: Under the data protection legislation you have the following rights:
s6List: To learn whether your personal data is being processed
To request information about your processed personal data
To request correction of your personal data
To request deletion or destruction of your personal data
To know the third parties to whom your personal data is transferred
privacy.s7Body: Our platform uses cookies to improve user experience. Cookies are small text files stored on your computer by your browser. You can manage or block cookies through your browser settings.
privacy.s8Body: This Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time. Significant changes will be communicated via email. Continued use of the platform means you accept the updated policy.

support.subtitle: Frequently asked questions and information that can help you
support.noAnswerDesc: For other questions, get in touch with our support team

cat1Items.a: Sınav Salonu is a comprehensive education platform that offers online test-solving to candidates preparing for various exams and hosts content created by expert educators in their fields.
By clicking the 'Sign In' button on the home page you can register as a candidate or an educator. You can create an account with your email address and start solving tests right away.
Signing up is free. You can explore tests and check out educators. Once you purchase test packages you can start solving them.

cat2Items.a: Select the test you are interested in and click the 'Buy' button on the detail page. After completing payment, you can access the test instantly.

cat2Items.q: How long can I access the tests I bought?
cat2Items.a: You have unlimited access to the test packages you have bought. You can solve them whenever and however many times you want.

cat2Items.q: How can I see my test results?
cat2Items.a: From the 'My Results' page you can view all your test results, detailed analyses and performance charts.

cat2Items.q: How do I report an incorrect question?
cat2Items.a: While solving a test, you can report questions you believe are incorrect using the 'Report Question' button on the question.

cat3Items.q: Which payment methods do you accept?
cat3Items.a: You can pay with credit cards and debit cards. All your payments are processed through secure payment infrastructure.
If there is a problem with the test package you bought, you can apply from the 'Request Refund' page. Your incorrect-question reports are evaluated, and if found justified, your refund is processed.

cat4Items.q: How can I apply as an educator?
cat4Items.a: Register as an educator, complete your profile information and areas of expertise. Upload the required documents for academic verification. After approval you can start creating tests.

cat4Items.q: How much can I earn as an educator?
cat4Items.a: You earn income at the defined commission rate from test sales. Your earnings grow with your sales performance.

cat4Items.q: How does the test creation process work?
cat4Items.a: From the 'Create Test' page, enter test info, add questions and publish. Once your tests are approved, they are offered to candidates.

cat5Items.q: How can I change my password?
cat5Items.a: You can change your password from the Profile Settings page. Enter your current password and set a new one.

cat5Items.q: How can I delete my account?
cat5Items.a: To delete your account, contact our support team. After your request is evaluated, your account will be deleted.

cat5Items.q: How can I manage my notification settings?
cat5Items.a: From the Profile Settings page you can turn email notifications, test reminders and other notifications on or off.

settings.heading: Scheduler Settings
settings.cronHelp: Standard 5-field format: minute hour day month weekday. E.g. "0 3 * * *" runs daily at 03:00.
settings.targetDirHelp: Absolute path. Must be writable from the container. E.g. /var/backups/sinav-salonu
settings.retentionDaysHelp: Backup files older than this will be deleted automatically. 0 = never delete.

runNow.heading: Manual Backup
runNow.description: Take a backup immediately without waiting for the scheduler.

tunnelInfo.title: What Is a Tunnel?
tunnelInfo.intro: A Tunnel is different from a classic test — it is an adaptive mastery-learning module.
tunnelInfo.normalDesc: Fixed questions. You solve it once and see your score at the end.
tunnelInfo.tunnelDesc: Layers from easy to hard. Every question has 5 options; the correct answer is always there, but its position changes.
tunnelInfo.point1: When you answer a question correctly across repeated presentations with different option arrangements, it counts as 'mastered'. These repetitions aim for real understanding through reinforcement.
tunnelInfo.point2: Once you show success on the questions of each level, you start seeing questions from the next stage.
tunnelInfo.point3: When you complete all levels, the tunnel ends and the topic is considered learned. A tunnel is meant for in-depth learning of a single topic.
tunnelInfo.point4: A tunnel is completed only once. The progress you have made cannot be undone.
